remarks: Welcome to this accessible third-floor 2-bedroom apartment nestled in the sought-after East Norwalk area, within a lovely owner-occupied four-family home. Enjoy the convenience of being just a short stroll from the East Norwalk train station, Vet's Park, Calf Pasture Beach, and the vibrant offerings of SoNo. In this inviting space, you'll only need to cover the electric bill and renter's insurance-while the landlord takes care of heating oil, gas for cooking, and water. With good credit required for consideration, you can feel secure in your new home. For your convenience, a dedicated washer and dryer are located in the basement, and parking is available for one car in the driveway, with additional options on East Ave or Cottage Street. Please note, no pets are allowed. Heat, hot water, gas paid by landlord! No offers with poor credit or low income to be considered. Come and experience the comfort and community of East Norwalk!
